title: cypella peruviana subsp. herrerae
intro: Cypella peruviana subsp. herrerae, also known as the Peruvian lily or Herrara's cypella, is a plant species belonging to the Iridaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Cypella peruviana subsp. herrerae include reducing inflammation, soothing coughs, and relieving congestion, making it a popular herbal remedy for respiratory conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are typically consumed in moderation under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
